candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Non-current assets category, not total current assets.
Direct balance-sheet cash line matching cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow ending balance can tie to balance sheet cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Exchange gains/losses on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a cash balance; only FX effect on cash.
Direct match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Explicit current portion of long-term debt within 1 year; matches STD and excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt excluding Capital Leases
candidates.why: Ideal label for STD if populated; explicitly excludes capital leases.
Current short-term borrowing component that may need to be added if no clean current debt total exists.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt excluding Capital Leases

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the minimal non-lease short-term debt components: current portion of long-term debt excluding capital leases plus credit facilities. Avoided 'Borrowings' because the label appears in both non-current and current sections and could create ambiguity/double counting. 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' was not added to avoid overlap with current portion debt.

candidates.why: Direct current tax liability/payable line on the balance sheet.
Likely current tax asset/receivable under current assets, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but this is a clear exact balance-sheet tax payable/current tax liability label.

candidates.why: Direct total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred over individual PPE components and over intangible asset labels.
Appears to subtotal PPE components, but generic label is less clean than explicit total PPE.
Only one PPE component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Chose explicit total net PPE label outside the candidate shortlist; confident because it is the direct balance-sheet PPE total.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Not total assets.
Direct net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before financial items
candidates.why: Pre-financial-items subtotal, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Intermediate balancing line, not as clean as the reported operating cash flow total.

variables.notes: Selected the final reported operating cash flow total.
